# fileURL

**Instance Property**

Specifies the URL where the screenshot process saves the output.

## Declaration

```swift
var fileURL: URL? { get set }
```

## Discussion

If `imageOutputURL` is `nil`, then the file isn’t saved.
title: fileURL
